stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
You are about to depart for a commercial flight. As part of your pre-flight calculations and given the following information, you need to calculate the Traffic Load in accordance with the standard passenger (use All adult) and baggage masses, as defined in the annex.

Flight crew: 4 male & 3 female
Male passengers: 70
Female passengers: 35
Infants: 3 seated on their own seat
Infants: 2 seated with their parents
Baggage: 62 items
Standard mass for a flight crew member: 85 kg
Non-revenue load: 575 kg
Cargo compartments: three carrying 1800 kg, 1500 kg and 500 kg respectively
